name: number-research
title: Number Research
description: Research numbers and discover if they have been searched before on numberresearch.xyz
author: 0xdhrv

commands.name: discover-number
commands.title: Discover Number
commands.description: Check if a number has been discovered before

commands.name: view-stats
commands.title: Number Stats
commands.description: View top numbers and stats from Number Research

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
